CONTACT

How can we help?

Start a booking enquiry or ask us anything before deciding.

For booking enquiries, a preferred date or venue detail can provide enough context.

Email Party.LAN directlyhello@partylan.co.uk

Thanks — your enquiry has been sent.

We’ll get back to you as soon as possible.

Hosted gaming parties, delivered to your venue.
